meaning: n.拥立国王者(尤指英国亨利六世时的Warwick 伯爵)
examples: Mr. Takeshita became the party's kingmaker, handing the largest faction over to one of his own disciples.
The earl of Warwick was the first kingmaker.
Peter Mandelson Kingmaker and Gordon's former enemy.
Is the hope now that California will become a kingmaker in a way it hasn't been?
Mr Ozawa was kingmaker, as both faction leader and LDP secretary-general, but never prime minister.
